ddt:Target.Name: N_L21B_DCM_UDS_D5_20161125
ddt:Target.Description:
[1] 2016/11/25 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo 1. Updated Devicies's data.
[N] 2016/10/25 Nissan XX6 C.Kudo Initial Creation.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DataRead_$010E_#004_(TBD)Ecall Change Log – SMS fallback number_Old number
DataRead_$010E_#036_(TBD)Ecall Change Log – SMS fallback number_New number
DataRead_$010E_#068_(TBD)Ecall Change Log – SMS fallback number_Request number
DataRead_$010E_#100_(TBD)Ecall Change Log – SMS fallback number_Timestamp
DataRead_$010F_#004_(TBD)Ecall Change Log – Test number_Old number
DataRead_$010F_#036_(TBD)Ecall Change Log – Test number_New number
DataRead_$010F_#068_(TBD)Ecall Change Log – Test number_Request number
DataRead_$010F_#100_(TBD)Ecall Change Log – Test number_Timestamp number

Item.Text: (TBD)No automatic eCall has ever been detected before
(TBD)not registered, MS is not currently searching for a new operator
(TBD)not registered, MS currently searching for a base station
(TBD)not registered, MS is not currently searching for a new operator
(TBD)not registered, MS currently searching for a base station

Data.Name: DataRead_$401A_#004_(TBD)Remote EV Action Acknowledgment Time Out
DataRead_$401B_#004_(TBD)Max Time to Send Random Upload
DataRead_$4036_#004_(TBD)Ecall DURATION LED ON AT START

Item.Text: (TBD)False (callback request by sms is not allowed)

Data.Name: DataRead_$4051_#004_(TBD)Time before start PROBE DAI monitoring
DataRead_$4055_#004_bit0_(TBD)EV DAI Services Deactivation Status_Certificate Upload
DataRead_$4055_#004_bit1_(TBD)EV DAI Services Deactivation Status_Charge Profile

DataRead_$4056_#004_bit2_(TBD)PROBE DAI Services Deactivation Status_Vehicle Status#2
